cases.prompt: 이 유튜브 영상 자막 가져와서 위키에 정리해줘.

assertions.text: Extracts subtitles with yt-dlp using --skip-download (ko,en preferred), never downloading the video body
Strips timecodes/indices and de-dupes rolled-up auto-sub lines (awk '!seen[$0]++')
Writes a new raw/transcripts file with frontmatter (source_url, source_type, captured, ingested:false) and hands off to wiki-ingest

cases.prompt: Import this PDF paper into my knowledge base.

assertions.text: Extracts PDF text via pdftotext -layout, falling back to pypdf/pdfplumber, and reports if a scanned PDF needs OCR
Adds a new file under raw/documents only (raw/ stays immutable) and leaves wiki/ compilation to wiki-ingest
